name: staged-review
description: Universal review chain inside the five-phase development lifecycle (task-driver(1) → worktree(2) → bots(3) → merge(4: GH-native gh pr merge --auto) → audit-review(5)). Two sibling skills — code-review (pre-commit triage, single-reviewer), audit-review (post-merge full 5+1 with mandatory Codex, absorbs bot-comment triage + Linear close-out + acceptance-criteria verification). v2.0.0: commit-review skill (901 LOC) deleted; pre-merge phase becomes GitHub-native auto-merge — see `plugins/staged-review/templates/auto-merge.md` for branch-protection + `[BLOCK-MERGE]` label gate setup. Bot-comment triage (Step 5d, 3-reasoner merge), Linear close-out (Step 12.5), and acceptance-criteria verification (Step 9 extension) absorbed into audit-review. Pre-merge ceremony's ~100k tokens/PR for marginal signal over CodeRabbit + Copilot + Codex GH bot + CI was unjustifiable; cloud-agent wake-up loops would have just relocated the bill. v1.20.0: audit-review decoupled from commit-review — no synchronous chain off any merge or PR-create. The deferred model unifies all triggers into two paths: SessionStart hook (`check-unaudited-commits.sh`, ≥3 unaudited threshold) surfaces unaudited tails; user invokes `/staged-review:audit-status` (snapshot) or `Skill(audit-review) <range>` (batched audit). commit-review Step 15 (synchronous audit chain) deleted; Step 16 (Linear close-out) renumbered to Step 15. audit-review's 4 chain triggers (worktree post-PR-create, commit-review auto-merge tail, linear-queue post-merge, post-PR-create Trigger 1) collapsed to 2 (hook + manual). Merge-train cascades (`flow-review`) run one batched audit over `<train-base>..<default-branch-HEAD>` at the end of the cascade instead of one per merge. Design choice: manual + hook (not background fire-and-forget) — background subprocesses can't spawn subagents (harness rule) and output isn't visible. Batching N merges into one pass replaces N synchronous per-merge audits. v1.19.4: all three skill bodies aligned to the rmap-first roadmap posture — ceremony-floor "ROADMAP candidate" findings file via `rmap new --from-stdin`; audit-review's doc-update step runs `rmap status` / `rmap render` instead of hand-editing ROADMAP.md. Doc-reference-only, no behavior change. v1.19.3: commit-review + audit-review skill bodies repointed from the now-split `linear-workflow` include to `linear-queue` / `agent-dispatch` / `agent-pr-review`; stale `§` section anchors fixed (commit-review carried ~17 — `Codex-Reviews-Cursor Pattern`, `Linear GH Auto-Transitions`, `Default flow is review-only`, etc.). Doc-reference-only, no behavior change. v1.19.2: audit-review Codex-dispatch model corrected (Steps 5b, 5c, 10) — replaces the v1.19.1 `--wait` instruction (not a valid flag for `task`) with deliberate `--background` + direct-Bash polling of `codex-companion status/result` (slash commands are user-only). Codex investigations regularly take 5-30+ min; foreground would hit the Bash 10-min cap mid-investigation and silently degrade to single-reviewer. Background dispatch uses the codex plugin's persistent broker (jobs survive across Claude turns and sessions); stall after 30 min checkpoints to `.audit/_in_progress_<range>.md` and stops the audit instead of dropping the Codex finding. New Step 5c documents resume-from-checkpoint. Rationale: Codex catches bugs Claude misses; losing those to wall-time bounds is unacceptable. v1.19: Phase Awareness headers on all three skills (predecessor/successor + Linear status entry/exit); commit-review Linear-optional (mode-split at Step 1: Linear-aware OR gh-only — no abort, self-authored worktree PRs and Linear-free projects both supported); commit-review auto-merge widened from cloud-agent-branches-only to all feature-branch PRs (worktree branches qualify too, gated on the 5 preconditions); audit-review trigger relocated post-merge (was post-pr-create) so bot findings are integrated and the audit commit lands durably on the default branch. v1.18: code-review RELAXED — removed mandatory parallel Codex dispatch from pre-commit; dual-reviewer pass now exclusively in audit-review. v1.17: audit-status command + unaudited-commits SessionStart hook. v1.16: audit-review skill + commit-review simplification with auto-merge.
